daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving curious intellectual energy. The cosmos is encouraging you to lean into conversations that challenge your usual perspective—there's magic in the exchange of ideas today.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, your charm is absolutely immaculate rn. If you've been holding back thoughts, today's the day to share them. Vulnerability hits different when you're feeling this emotionally grounded.
daily.career: Your brain is firing on all cylinders. This is peak creative problem-solving energy—trust those unconventional ideas bouncing around in your head. Your unique angle is exactly what's needed right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and mental reset. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or just switching up your usual routine, honoring that restless energy will help you feel more aligned and present.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini, and honestly? You're about to feel that creative spark reignite. This is your moment to stop overthinking and actually trust your gut for once. Something shifts midweek that opens a door you didn't know was there.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's real magic happening in your connections. If you're dating, that person who's been on your mind? They're thinking about you too. Already in something? This is prime time to have those vulnerable conversations you've been avoiding.
weekly.career: Your ideas are literally hitting different right now. That project or proposal you've been sitting on? Stop waiting for the perfect moment—pitch it. Your communication skills are maxed out, and people are actually listening. Use this window while it's open.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime, so actually give yourself permission to slow down. Movement that feels good (walks, stretching, whatever) hits harder this week. Hydrate more than usual and maybe skip the extra caffeine—your body's asking for it.
